grammarNote.title: Relative Clauses (continued): Building Longer Sentences
grammarNote.explanation:
Avril a repéré l'endroit. Le pépé est malin. Il a failli tomber. — notice failli: he ALMOST fell. The verb faillir + infinitive means 'nearly doing' something.

Sentences are getting longer now. Look for sentences with two verbs or two clauses joined together.

Re-read and find the longest sentence. How many ideas does it contain?
